notes: Vision-gap seam under #567 (owner directive 2026-07-01: 'this is what we want but it's not what we got — shrink the gap', two vision PDFs). Three commits on this branch: (A) conviction_line — scorer diagnostics (matchedGoal + deprioritized kill reasons + candidateCount) now render as the card's closing footer ('Ranked against X · beat Y (important, not today) and N others.'), replacing the bare coverage count when provable; (B) judgment ratchet — Dismiss on Slack AND dashboard now skips the winner's real backing tkg_actions row via executeAction (feedback_weight -0.5, skip_reason slack_dismiss/dashboard_dismiss), closing the one-way dismissal loop (#592); presence receipts unchanged; ~1,204 historical presence_action rows NOT backfilled (owner decision); (C) all-clear closure — quiet dashboard backs safe_silence with pipeline_runs evidence ('Checked N open loops at <time> — nothing needs you'), display-only, nothing pushed, evidence only when latest user_run was safe_silence + count>=1 + <24h. No migrations, no gate loosened, SAFE_SILENCE still a push-success. Known pre-existing test failure also on clean main: seed-from-scorer route test (env-shaped 500s). Live proof still owed after merge: conviction footer on a real card; a real dismiss flipping its row to skipped; all-clear on a real quiet day. #606 live-verification still pending (unchanged).
